name: Assets Management Technician Offboarding
description: Assets management offboarding process for departing technicians

steps.title: Verify Asset Returns
steps.description: Ensure all company assets are properly returned

substeps.title: Check asset register
substeps.description: Review all assets assigned to departing technician

substeps.title: Perform physical asset inspection
substeps.description: Inspect returned assets for damage or excessive wear

substeps.title: Verify asset functionality
substeps.description: Test that returned assets function as expected

substeps.title: Update asset management system
substeps.description: Mark assets as returned and update their status

steps.title: Compliance and Documentation Check
steps.description: Verify all compliance requirements are met

substeps.title: Verify return documentation
substeps.description: Ensure all required return paperwork is completed

substeps.title: Review any damage reports
substeps.description: Document any asset damage for potential charges
